tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low CO₂, and significant proteinuria, suggesting impaired renal function, possibly chronic kidney disease. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, glucose, bilirubin, ketones) further support renal dysfunction and possible tubular damage. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend nephrology evaluation and further assessment of renal function and underlying etiology.

display.value: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
